log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
--- Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: IMMUNE to charmed! No effect.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Finger of Death (Level 7 slot, 0 remaining). DC 20 CON save on Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster.
→ Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster: CON save [d20:3+4=7 vs DC 20] FAIL! 37 necrotic damage. HP: 30/67
--- Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:5+9=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
=== ROUND 3 ===
Lich is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Lich WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:7+9=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
--- Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Lich.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster.
→ Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster healed for 7 HP. HP: 37/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 30 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hold Person ends!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
=== ROUND 5 ===
--- Lich's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Shadar-Kai — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 32 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 16] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
